name: U2
bio: U2 still monetizes at global catalog scale through stadium-era hits, long-tail streaming, and unusually durable multi-decade recognition.
notable_for: Arena-scale catalog songs with exceptional long-tail replay and global familiarity.
career_highlight: Songs like With or Without You and One continue to define the commercial afterlife of the U2 catalog.
revenue_drivers: Global catalog streaming keeps the biggest songs commercially active decades after release.
Cross-generational recognition supports playlist placement and recurring discovery.
Film, television, and event-driven use can reactivate familiar recordings.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps U2's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: U2's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
